real_estate.label: Real Estate Agent

fields.label: Regions (comma-separated)
fields.placeholder: South Austin, Bee Cave, Lakeway, Buda

fields.label: Active Listings (one per line: address | price | beds/baths | notes)
fields.placeholder: 1847 S 3rd St, Austin 78704 | $625,000 | 3/2 | Modern farmhouse, walk to SoCo

fields.label: Past Clients (name | close date | address — one per line)

real_estate.brand_voice_template: Real estate agent: {agentName} at {brokerage}. Specialize in {regions}. Focus areas: {specialty}. Professional, knowledgeable, approachable tone. Position as the local market expert. Never use ALL CAPS or 'MUST SEE' language.
sample_prompts: Write 3 social posts about my listing at [address]
Draft a market update for [neighborhood] this month
Write an open house invite email for Saturday
Give me 5 talking points for a listing presentation at $500K
Draft a follow-up email to a buyer who went silent after a showing
Write a just-sold celebration post
Compare [neighborhood A] vs [neighborhood B] for a relocating family

local_service.label: Local Service Business

fields.label: Industry / Trade
fields.placeholder: Plumbing, HVAC, Pest Control, Cleaning, etc.

fields.label: Services Offered (one per line)
fields.placeholder:
Drain cleaning
Water heater repair
Leak detection
Pipe installation

fields.label: Service Area (comma-separated cities)
fields.placeholder: Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Pflugerville

local_service.brand_voice_template: {businessName} — {industry} serving {serviceArea}. Owned by {ownerName}, {yearsInBiz} years in business. {license}. Tone: trustworthy, professional, local. Emphasize reliability, same-day service, and honest pricing.
sample_prompts: Write 5 social posts for this week
Draft a monthly newsletter with seasonal tips
Write a blog post about common [industry] problems homeowners face
Draft a response to this negative Google review: [paste review]
Give me a referral program email to send to past customers
Write a cold outreach email for a commercial account

restaurant_cafe.label: Restaurant / Cafe / Bar

fields.label: Cuisine / Type
fields.placeholder: Specialty coffee, BBQ, Italian, bar & grill

fields.label: Menu Highlights (one per line: item | price | description)
fields.placeholder:
Cortado | $5 | House-roasted espresso with steamed milk
Avocado Toast | $12 | Sourdough, pickled onion, everything seasoning

fields.label: Vibe / Atmosphere
fields.placeholder: Cozy, industrial-modern, neighborhood hangout, date-night spot

fields.label: Events / Specials (optional)
fields.placeholder: Live music Thursdays, happy hour 3-6pm, Sunday brunch

restaurant_cafe.brand_voice_template: {name} — {cuisine} in {location}. Vibe: {vibe}. Hours: {hours}. Tone: warm, inviting, community-focused. Highlight the craft, the people, and the experience. Never feel corporate or chain-like.
sample_prompts: Write 5 social posts for this week highlighting different menu items
Draft a 'weekend specials' Instagram post
Write a monthly email newsletter with upcoming events
Draft a response to a 3-star Yelp review about slow service
Write a catering inquiry response email
Give me 3 ideas for a slow-Tuesday promotion

health_wellness.label: Health & Wellness

fields.label: Type
fields.placeholder: Med spa, chiropractor, dentist, personal trainer, yoga studio

fields.label: Provider Names & Credentials
fields.placeholder: Dr. Sarah Kim, MD — Board Certified Dermatologist

fields.label: Services (one per line: service | price range)

health_wellness.brand_voice_template: {name} — {type} in {location}. Providers: {providers}. Target: {target}. Tone: educated, calming, aspirational but not intimidating. Always HIPAA-conscious — never reference specific patient outcomes or make medical claims. Focus on how services make clients feel, not clinical results.
sample_prompts: Write 5 educational social posts about our services
Draft a new patient welcome email sequence (3 emails)
Write a blog post: 'What to Expect at Your First [Service] Appointment'
Draft a re-engagement email for clients we haven't seen in 6 months
Write a seasonal promotion post for [holiday/season]
Draft a provider spotlight post for [provider name]

professional_services.label: Professional Services

fields.label: Type
fields.placeholder: Accounting, law firm, insurance, financial advisory, consulting

fields.label: Specialization
fields.placeholder: Small business tax, estate planning, commercial insurance

fields.label: Key People & Titles
fields.placeholder:
Michael Chen, CPA — Managing Partner
Lisa Wong, CPA — Tax Director

fields.label: Target Clients
fields.placeholder: Small business owners, startups, high-net-worth individuals

fields.label: Competitors
fields.placeholder: Maxwell & Co CPA, Austin Tax Group

professional_services.brand_voice_template: {name} — {type} specializing in {specialty}. Location: {location}. Target: {target}. Tone: authoritative, trustworthy, approachable. Use clear language — avoid jargon unless writing for industry peers. Position as thought leaders. Always include appropriate disclaimers.
sample_prompts: Write a LinkedIn post about upcoming tax deadline changes
Draft a monthly client newsletter with regulatory updates
Write a thought leadership blog post about [topic]
Draft a cold outreach email to a potential client in [industry]
Write a case study about how we helped a client save on [topic]
Draft a referral thank-you email

ecommerce.label: E-Commerce / Retail

fields.label: Product Category
fields.placeholder: Women's clothing, home goods, jewelry, outdoor gear

fields.label: Best Sellers / Key Products
fields.placeholder:
Linen wrap dress — $89
Handmade ceramic mug set — $45
Gold hoops — $32

fields.label: Brand Story (1-2 sentences)
fields.placeholder: Started in my garage in 2020, now shipping nationwide. Every piece is ethically sourced.

ecommerce.brand_voice_template: {name} — {type}. Platform: {platform}. Target: {target}. Brand story: {brandStory}. Tone: authentic, aspirational but accessible, community-driven. Focus on the story behind products, not just features. User-generated content feels natural. Never sound like a corporate retailer.
sample_prompts: Write 5 product spotlight posts for this week
Draft a 'new arrivals' email campaign
Write a gift guide blog post for [holiday]
Draft an abandoned cart email sequence (3 emails)
Write a customer story post based on this review: [paste review]
Give me 3 Instagram Reel concepts for [product]

creative_agency.label: Creative / Agency

fields.label: Type
fields.placeholder: Photography, video production, design studio, marketing agency

fields.label: Services
fields.placeholder: Brand photography, video production, social media management, web design

fields.label: Notable Clients / Projects
fields.placeholder: Shot for Nike Austin pop-up, Whole Foods rebrand, 3 wedding venues

fields.label: Target Clients
fields.placeholder: Small businesses, startups, wedding couples, restaurants

creative_agency.brand_voice_template: {name} — {type}. Services: {services}. Target: {target}. Tone: creative, confident, portfolio-driven. Show don't tell. Let the work speak. Use behind-the-scenes content to humanize. Never sound desperate for clients — position as selective and in-demand.
sample_prompts: Write a case study post about our work with [client]
Draft a cold outreach email to a [type] business
Write a behind-the-scenes post about a recent shoot
Draft a proposal cover letter for a [type] project
Give me 5 portfolio caption ideas for Instagram
Write an award submission for [award name]
